tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 3
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 2
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "PING" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) # set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) # set srcintf "port2"
